title: Validation is presence-only; year/isbn types unchecked
evidence: src/app.ts:17 only checks `!title || !author`; a non-numeric `year` (e.g. "abc") is bound straight into the INTEGER column with no rejection
suggestion: Optionally validate year is a number and isbn is a string; spec only mandates title/author so this is a robustness nicety, not a gap

title: No error-handling middleware around DB calls
evidence: src/app.ts handlers call db.prepare(...).run/get with no try/catch; a DB exception surfaces as an unhandled Express 500 (stack in dev)
suggestion: Add an error-handling middleware to return a clean JSON 500

title: Author filter is exact-match only
evidence: src/app.ts:34 `WHERE author = ?` — no case-insensitive or partial match
suggestion: Spec only asks for an ?author= filter, which exact-match satisfies; note for cross-run comparison

title: TDD discipline followed per agent log; each route driven by a test
evidence: _agent_stdout.log: 'Built strictly via TDD — each route driven by a failing supertest first'; tests/ cover every route (13 tests). Red/green cycle itself is not reconstructable from final artifacts
suggestion: None — prompt=tdd instruction appears honored; process is cannot-verify from final state but test coverage is complete
